title: God’s Judgment Falls
description: The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Conis, McKinley, Luffy, Nami, Usopp. The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: What's that? Cloud drifting sounds comfortable!

dialogue.speaker: McKinley
dialogue.text: Run!! You guys can't beat them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys have some cool stuff!!

summary: The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
